exploretock / Restaurant workflow 1.name: exploretock / Restaurant workflow 1
exploretock / Restaurant workflow 1.task: Check for pickup restaurant available in Boston, NY on March 18, 5pm with just one guest
exploretock / Restaurant workflow 1.goal_pattern: Find available restaurants for a specific reservation type and location.

applicability.when_to_use: When the user wants to find restaurants on Tock with a specific reservation type (e.g., Pickup, Delivery) and location.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When searching for a specific restaurant by name or for a standard 'Dine in' reservation without changing the default location.

steps.step_intent: Select the desired reservation type.
steps.target_description: The dropdown menu for choosing the reservation type, such as 'Dine in', 'Pickup', or 'Delivery'.
steps.value_policy: Select the reservation type specified in the task goal (e.g., 'Pickup').

steps.step_intent: Clear the pre-filled location to enter a new one.
steps.target_description: The clear button, often an 'X' icon, located inside or next to the location input field.

llm_raw_abstraction.name: exploretock / Restaurant workflow 1
llm_raw_abstraction.goal_pattern: Find available restaurants for a specific reservation type and location.

applicability.when_to_use: When the user wants to find restaurants on Tock with a specific reservation type (e.g., Pickup, Delivery) and location.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When searching for a specific restaurant by name or for a standard 'Dine in' reservation without changing the default location.

steps.step_intent: Select the desired reservation type.
steps.target_description: The dropdown menu for choosing the reservation type, such as 'Dine in', 'Pickup', or 'Delivery'.
steps.value_policy: Select the reservation type specified in the task goal (e.g., 'Pickup').

steps.step_intent: Clear the pre-filled location to enter a new one.
steps.target_description: The clear button, often an 'X' icon, located inside or next to the location input field.

exploretock / Restaurant workflow 2.name: exploretock / Restaurant workflow 2
exploretock / Restaurant workflow 2.task: Book a winery tour in Napa Valley in a winery which serves Mediterranean cuisine with wine testing for 4 guests on April 15, 10 am in a outdoor setup.
exploretock / Restaurant workflow 2.goal_pattern: Search for and filter experiences like dining, events, or winery tours based on specific criteria.

applicability.when_to_use: When starting a search for an experience on Tock and needing to apply detailed filters to the results.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When booking a previously visited or known establishment directly without searching.

steps.step_intent: Initiate a search for experiences.
steps.target_description: Search button located next to the location input field.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the button adjacent to the location input.
steps.success_signal: The page loads search results.

steps.step_intent: Open the advanced filters panel.
steps.target_description: Button to display more filtering options, often labeled 'Filters' or represented by a filter icon.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the button labeled 'Filters'.
steps.success_signal: A panel with additional filter categories appears.

llm_raw_abstraction.name: exploretock / Restaurant workflow 2
llm_raw_abstraction.goal_pattern: Search for and filter experiences like dining, events, or winery tours based on specific criteria.

applicability.when_to_use: When starting a search for an experience on Tock and needing to apply detailed filters to the results.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When booking a previously visited or known establishment directly without searching.

steps.step_intent: Initiate a search for experiences.
steps.target_description: Search button located next to the location input field.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the button adjacent to the location input.
steps.success_signal: The page loads search results.

steps.step_intent: Open the advanced filters panel.
steps.target_description: Button to display more filtering options, often labeled 'Filters' or represented by a filter icon.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the button labeled 'Filters'.
steps.success_signal: A panel with additional filter categories appears.

enterprise / Car rental workflow 3.name: enterprise / Car rental workflow 3
enterprise / Car rental workflow 3.task: Sign Allan Smith for email offers with the email allan.smith@gmail.com and zip code 10001
enterprise / Car rental workflow 3.goal_pattern: Sign up for email offers with user details: {first_name}, {last_name}, {email}, {zip_code}

applicability.when_to_use: When the user wants to subscribe to email promotions or newsletters.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When the user wants to book a car, manage a reservation, or perform any action other than signing up for email offers.

steps.step_intent: Navigate to the email offers sign-up page.
steps.target_description: Email Offers
steps.selection_rule: Choose the link associated with the text 'Email Offers'.
steps.success_signal: A form for email sign-up with fields like 'First Name' and 'Last Name' becomes visible.

steps.step_intent: Enter the user's first name.
steps.target_description: First Name
steps.value_policy: Use the first name from the user details provided in the task goal.
steps.selection_rule: Select the text input field with an attribute like 'first-name'.
steps.success_signal: The first name is correctly entered into the input field.

llm_raw_abstraction.name: enterprise / Car rental workflow 3
llm_raw_abstraction.goal_pattern: Sign up for email offers with user details: {first_name}, {last_name}, {email}, {zip_code}

applicability.when_to_use: When the user wants to subscribe to email promotions or newsletters.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When the user wants to book a car, manage a reservation, or perform any action other than signing up for email offers.

steps.step_intent: Navigate to the email offers sign-up page.
steps.target_description: Email Offers
steps.selection_rule: Choose the link associated with the text 'Email Offers'.
steps.success_signal: A form for email sign-up with fields like 'First Name' and 'Last Name' becomes visible.

steps.step_intent: Enter the user's first name.
steps.target_description: First Name
steps.value_policy: Use the first name from the user details provided in the task goal.
steps.selection_rule: Select the text input field with an attribute like 'first-name'.
steps.success_signal: The first name is correctly entered into the input field.

enterprise / Car rental workflow 4.name: enterprise / Car rental workflow 4
enterprise / Car rental workflow 4.task: Find a mini van at Brooklyn City from April 5th to April 8th for a 22 year old renter.
enterprise / Car rental workflow 4.goal_pattern: Find a specific car type at a given location for specified dates and renter age.

applicability.when_to_use: When starting a car rental search by specifying a location.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When the location is already selected or the user wants to use their current location.

steps.step_intent: Enter the desired pick-up and return location.
steps.target_description: Search input for pick-up and return location, labeled 'Pick-up & Return Location (ZIP, City or Airport'.
steps.value_policy: Use the city or airport name from the user's request.
steps.selection_rule: N/A
steps.success_signal: A dropdown list of location suggestions appears.

steps.step_intent: Select the correct location from the auto-suggested list.
steps.target_description: The list item in the location suggestions that matches the intended city and state/country.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the option that contains the desired location text (e.g., 'Brooklyn, NY, US').
steps.success_signal: The location input field is populated with the selected location and the suggestion list disappears.

llm_raw_abstraction.name: enterprise / Car rental workflow 4
llm_raw_abstraction.goal_pattern: Find a specific car type at a given location for specified dates and renter age.

applicability.when_to_use: When starting a car rental search by specifying a location.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When the location is already selected or the user wants to use their current location.

steps.step_intent: Enter the desired pick-up and return location.
steps.target_description: Search input for pick-up and return location, labeled 'Pick-up & Return Location (ZIP, City or Airport'.
steps.value_policy: Use the city or airport name from the user's request.
steps.selection_rule: N/A
steps.success_signal: A dropdown list of location suggestions appears.

steps.step_intent: Select the correct location from the auto-suggested list.
steps.target_description: The list item in the location suggestions that matches the intended city and state/country.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the option that contains the desired location text (e.g., 'Brooklyn, NY, US').
steps.success_signal: The location input field is populated with the selected location and the suggestion list disappears.

kohls / Department workflow 5.name: kohls / Department workflow 5
kohls / Department workflow 5.task: Find the highest rated dog collar under 10 dollar.
kohls / Department workflow 5.goal_pattern: Navigate to a specific product department.

applicability.when_to_use: When the user wants to browse a specific product department on Kohl's.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When the user is searching for a specific product using the search bar or is not on a page with the main category navigation.

steps.step_intent: Open the main category navigation menu.
steps.target_description: The main category navigation link, labeled 'Shop by Category'.
steps.selection_rule: N/A
steps.success_signal: A menu displaying product categories becomes visible.

steps.step_intent: Select the target product department from the category list.
steps.target_description: The link for the desired product department.
steps.value_policy: Infer the department from the product mentioned in the task goal. For 'dog collar', the department is 'Pet'.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the link whose text matches the inferred department name.
steps.success_signal: The page loads the selected department's product listing.

llm_raw_abstraction.name: kohls / Department workflow 5
llm_raw_abstraction.goal_pattern: Navigate to a specific product department.

applicability.when_to_use: When the user wants to browse a specific product department on Kohl's.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When the user is searching for a specific product using the search bar or is not on a page with the main category navigation.

steps.step_intent: Open the main category navigation menu.
steps.target_description: The main category navigation link, labeled 'Shop by Category'.
steps.selection_rule: N/A
steps.success_signal: A menu displaying product categories becomes visible.

steps.step_intent: Select the target product department from the category list.
steps.target_description: The link for the desired product department.
steps.value_policy: Infer the department from the product mentioned in the task goal. For 'dog collar', the department is 'Pet'.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the link whose text matches the inferred department name.
steps.success_signal: The page loads the selected department's product listing.

united / Airlines workflow 6.name: united / Airlines workflow 6
united / Airlines workflow 6.task: Compare the fare types to book a 1-adult ticket from Springfiels, IL to Austin, TX for April 29th 2023
united / Airlines workflow 6.goal_pattern: Enter the departure airport for a flight search.

applicability.when_to_use: When starting a flight search and needing to specify the departure location.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When the departure location is already populated or the flight search form is different.

steps.step_intent: Enter the name of the departure city to trigger airport suggestions.
steps.target_description: Input field for the departing city, labeled 'From*'.
steps.value_policy: Use the city name from the specified departure location.
steps.success_signal: A dropdown list of matching airports appears.

steps.step_intent: Select the specific departure airport from the list of suggestions.
steps.target_description: The airport suggestion button in the dropdown list.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the button whose label contains the city, state, and airport code matching the specified departure location.
steps.success_signal: The 'From' input field is populated with the selected airport.

llm_raw_abstraction.name: united / Airlines workflow 6
llm_raw_abstraction.goal_pattern: Enter the departure airport for a flight search.

applicability.when_to_use: When starting a flight search and needing to specify the departure location.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When the departure location is already populated or the flight search form is different.

steps.step_intent: Enter the name of the departure city to trigger airport suggestions.
steps.target_description: Input field for the departing city, labeled 'From*'.
steps.value_policy: Use the city name from the specified departure location.
steps.success_signal: A dropdown list of matching airports appears.

steps.step_intent: Select the specific departure airport from the list of suggestions.
steps.target_description: The airport suggestion button in the dropdown list.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the button whose label contains the city, state, and airport code matching the specified departure location.
steps.success_signal: The 'From' input field is populated with the selected airport.

budget / Car rental workflow 7.name: budget / Car rental workflow 7

applicability.when_not_to_use: When the user wants to start a booking directly from the main page search form.

steps.step_intent: Navigate to the location finder section.
steps.target_description: A primary navigation button labeled 'Locations'.
steps.selection_rule: N/A
steps.success_signal: Sub-navigation options related to locations appear.

steps.step_intent: Initiate the location search.
steps.target_description: A link labeled 'Find a Location'.
steps.selection_rule: N/A
steps.success_signal: A page or form for searching for a location is displayed.

underarmour / Fashion workflow 8.name: underarmour / Fashion workflow 8
underarmour / Fashion workflow 8.task: Find a men's UA outlet T-shirt of XL size and add to cart.
underarmour / Fashion workflow 8.goal_pattern: Find a {gender} outlet {product_type} of {size} and add to cart.

applicability.when_to_use: When the user wants to find a discounted item for a specific gender in the outlet section.
applicability.when_not_to_use: When the desired item is not in the outlet or the primary navigation path is different.

steps.step_intent: Navigate to the outlet section of the website.
steps.target_description: The main navigation link for the 'Outlet' section.
steps.selection_rule: N/A
steps.success_signal: The page displays outlet-specific categories or products.

steps.step_intent: Filter outlet products by gender.
steps.target_description: A link to refine results by gender.
steps.value_policy: Select the gender specified in the task goal (e.g., 'Mens').
steps.selection_rule: Choose the link whose label matches the target gender.
steps.success_signal: The product listing is updated to show items for the selected gender.
